name: sysop
description: Self-improving workflow for AI-assisted development. Lifecycle skills, convention promotion, deterministic checks.

plugins.name: sysop
plugins.description: Lifecycle skills, scripts, hooks, and docs for AI-assisted development. Required by all packs.

plugins.name: sysop-python
plugins.description: Python conventions: logger %s formatting, regex compilation, scripts/shared_cli.py CLI bootstrap, env-var validation.

plugins.name: sysop-postgres
plugins.description: Postgres + SQLAlchemy conventions: SQL safety, parameterized queries, role-engine separation, sensitive-table GRANT discipline.

plugins.name: sysop-nextjs-react
plugins.description: Next.js + React + TypeScript conventions: hooks rules, AbortController cleanup, fetch redirects, accessibility, ReactMarkdown safety.

plugins.name: sysop-llm
plugins.description: LLM integration conventions for multi-tenant web APIs (Anthropic / Gemini): cost bounds, prompt boundary escaping, JSON parse guards.

plugins.name: sysop-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server conventions: tool-arg validation, server-config secret handling, read-only-by-default boundaries, stdio-vs-HTTP/SSE transport (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-streamlit
plugins.description: Streamlit conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-pandas
plugins.description: Pandas conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-beancount
plugins.description: Beancount plain-text accounting conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-kotlin
plugins.description: Kotlin / Android native conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-swift-ios
plugins.description: Swift / iOS native conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).

plugins.name: sysop-flutter
plugins.description: Flutter / Dart conventions (placeholder — populates from real-project use).
